positive: Stylized minimalist graphic illustration of a whimsical mountain range silhouette at sunset. The mountains should be depicted in deep indigo and sapphire blue tones, contrasted sharply against a gradient sky of soft peach, vibrant coral, and golden yellow. Incorporate abstract, geometric meadow shapes and stylized wispy clouds (negative space element). The composition must be centrally framed and vertically oriented for strong apparel placement. The overall aesthetic should be modern, clean, and high contrast, suitable for screen printing on dark fabric. Vector art style, flat colors, perfect symmetry, highly detailed yet simplified.
